priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: price constraint ignored, ~80% reproducibility across all platforms, core value-proposition damage, multi-category cross-platform impact
severity_justification: The AI ignoring price constraints is a direct attack on SLAP's core value proposition — users explicitly set budgets and get results 2–5x over them at ~80% reproducibility across all platforms and categories. This matches the P1 ladder criteria of 'price/budget ignored' and 'core value-proposition damage.' Historical similar bug FLIPPI-1637 (model unable to display correct products, P1) and FLIPPI-1730 (filters ignored, P1) confirm P1 precedent; FLIPPI-1888 was filed as P3 but that classification appears understated given the cross-platform, multi-category scope described here.
owner_reason: Assigned to 3 of the 5 top matches (FLIPPI-1888, FLIPPI-1637, FLIPPI-1017), all of which are search/recommendation relevance and constraint-handling issues at P1–P3, indicating ownership of the AI recommendation and result-relevance domain
